text:
First, note that time zones as we know them did not exist in 1517.  
But if we apply modern time zone rules retroactively:  
Asia/Riyadh = UTC+3 (no DST), Europe/Paris = UTC+1 (no DST in 1517).  
11:00 in Riyadh (UTC+3) → 08:00 UTC.  
08:00 UTC → 09:00 in Paris (UTC+1).  
Date remains April 20, 1517.  

FINAL_ANSWER: 09:00
